name: Synopsys
confidenceReason: Forward P/E 75.8x with slowing growth. Part of EDA duopoly moat but valuation leaves no margin of safety. Post-Ansys debt at 2.5x.
bullCase: An unbreakable EDA software duopoly. They are the ultimate toll road; whether a custom AI chip succeeds or fails, designers must pay for their software licenses.
bearCase: The margin of safety is nonexistent. Post-Ansys acquisition debt burden of ~2.5x Net Debt/EBITDA adds financial risk on top of extreme valuation.

cagrModel.basis: Non-GAAP adjusted EPS (excl Ansys amortization & SBC); non-GAAP P/E basis
